chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-957 of 2007 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Appl. In d/o case For hearing of CMA 16705/2011(Restore) 08-08-2024 Mr. Illahi Bux Jamali, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** By consent, listed Restoration Application is allowed and the matter is restored to its original position and heard today. After hearing the matter, it appears that petitioner fears that unrelated private individuals may proceed to have changed Foti Khata Badal of the petitioner’s ancestral land. Without getting into merits of the case, since instant petition is pending since 2007 and it does not appear to be a case of further indulgence, this petition is disposed of along with pending application(s) with directions to official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and not to make any change in the subject Khata, unless as mandated by the law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
